branch.branch_summary: Define the v7.3 Governed Multi-Actor Pilot slice: Council opens a bounded pilot, selects at least three persistent actors, records actor assignment/handoff evidence, verifies maker/checker separation, and closes the pilot through Work Execution Packet audit.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v7.2 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: After v7.2.0, advance v7.3 Governed Multi-Actor Pilot: prove that Council-selected actors can be assigned, produce bounded handoffs, and return evidence through the Work Execution Packet without weakening context/reference integrity.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: Define the v7.3 Governed Multi-Actor Pilot slice: Council opens a bounded pilot, selects at least three persistent actors, records actor assignment/handoff evidence, verifies maker/checker separation, and closes the pilot through Work Execution Packet audit.
